steps: Go to https://app.mailgun.com and log in or create an account
Click your profile menu icon in the top-right corner of the control panel
Enter a description for the key and select a role (e.g., 'Full Access')
Click 'Create Key' in the confirmation modal
Copy the displayed API key immediately — it is only shown once
Store the key securely in a password manager or secrets vault

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key (Private Key)
credential_fields.description: Your Mailgun private API key. Used as the password in HTTP Basic Auth with 'api' as the username.

notes: Mailgun uses HTTP Basic Auth: username is always 'api', password is your API key
API key is shown only once at creation — save it immediately
Role-based API keys (RBAC) let you restrict key permissions (e.g., send-only)
Free trial includes 5,000 emails/month for 3 months, then Flex plan pricing applies
New accounts start in sandbox mode — you must verify your sending domain before sending to unverified recipients
Sandbox domain is provided for testing but can only send to authorized recipients
US and EU API endpoints differ: US is api.mailgun.com, EU is api.eu.mailgun.com

test_endpoint.description: List all domains to verify credentials are working
